title: Sanji and Usopp Make Their Stand
description: Nami is forced to confront Enel directly, realizing how terrifying his lightning power and control over Skypiea truly are.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Gan Fall. Nami is forced to confront Enel directly, realizing how terrifying his lightning power and control over Skypiea truly are.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: This guy is a super psycho ____!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Ah... me? I'm here to find gold...

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I don't want your way of saving----!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Tell Wyper.... The God's shrine.... enel...

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: You were laughing at me, huh!?

summary: Nami is forced to confront Enel directly, realizing how terrifying his lightning power and control over Skypiea truly are.
